title: centropogon bonplandianus var. intermedius

side_effects: Centropogon bonplandianus var. intermedius can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of Centropogon bonplandianus var. intermedius has been linked to liver and kidney damage.
